query: Recent smart money movements on Solana DEXes
summary: Over the past 48 hours, a cluster of 12 high-grade wallets (S/A tier) have been aggressively accumulating POPCAT and WIF across Jupiter and Raydium, with combined inflows exceeding $10M. Simultaneously, several institutional-grade wallets have begun rotating out of VIRTUAL positions on Base, suggesting a broader risk-off sentiment toward AI agent tokens in favor of established Solana memecoins.
key_findings: 7 S-tier wallets converged on POPCAT within the same 6-hour window, a pattern historically correlated with 40-80% price moves within 72 hours
Smart money net outflows from VIRTUAL exceeded $2.3M this week, the largest sustained sell pressure since its January peak
Jupiter DEX volume spiked 340% on Wednesday, driven primarily by WIF/SOL and JUP/SOL pairs from wallets with >80 accumulation scores
Three previously dormant whale wallets (inactive 90+ days) reactivated and took large ONDO positions on Ethereum, totaling $4.8M in buys
DRIFT Protocol saw unusual options activity from sniper-cluster wallets, suggesting potential catalyst awareness ahead of their v2 launch
